calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-25-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: P. Dowling. Julius H. Hughey, Esq., appeared for the plaintiff and defendant appeared in pro per. Case settled per the record. Trial date is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. Defendant ERIN POTTER's demurrer was ordered off calendar. First Amended Complaint filed on 6/10/02. (AJR) Patrick Heard CSR#11055
